calendar.matters:
RECORD ON APPEAL Court Judgment-Small Claims Appeal
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Set For Trial On Jan-26-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 611

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-27-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Elan Wick, Clerk Karissa Shaw, not reported. (611)

APPEARANCES:
APPELLANT/Defendant: Valencia Auto represented by Fooad Laghaei (Owner) in Pro Per
RESPONDENT/Plaintiff: Jose Antonio Baltodano appearing in Pro Per

At 9:45 a.m., this cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Respondent/Plaintiff Baltodano is called to the witness stand and gives testimony on his own behalf. He is questioned by the Court regarding the factual issues of the case and his exhibit. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit RSP-A: Cancelled checks and documentation regarding sale and repair of Respondent's vehicle

Appellant/Defendant Fooad Laghaei questions the Respondent regarding his testimony. Respondent Baltodano concludes his testimony and is excused from the witness stand.

Appellant Laghaei takes the witness stand and gives testimony on behalf of Valencia Auto. He is questioned by the Court regarding the factual issues of the case and his exhibit. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit APP-1: Letters and receipts regarding repair to Respondent's vehicle

Appellant Laghaei is excused from the witness stand.

The parties submit the matter to the Court for ruling.

At 10:10 a.m., the hearing is concluded, the matter is taken under submission.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-26-2006 Continued To Jan-26-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-13-2006 Continued To Jan-26-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 10:00am
Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey S. Ross, clerk-beth wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for small claims appeal. Jose Antonio Baltodano appears as respondent in Pro Per, Fooad Laghaer appears as appellant in Pro Per and represents Valencia Auto. The matter is continued to 1/26/06, 9am, Dept. 525, to allow parties to resolve a Proof of Service issue.
10:05am
Court adjourns
